properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 146/21
 1.THE ROYAL NORWEGIAN AIRFORCE WILL CONDUCT AIRDROP OF CALIBRATION SPHERES IN TWO AREAS
 0900 TO 1500 UTC DAILY 17 NOV TO 18 NOV. 

 2.VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE 
 FOLLOWING DANGER AREA WITH A RADIUS OF 4NM FROM THE POSITIONS:
 A. 70-42.10N 31-21.03E
 B. 71-01.08N 31-34.01E
